name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Call method '...'
3. Pass parameters '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 💻 Code Sample

```csharp
// Minimal code sample that reproduces the issue
var task = new TaskItem("Title", "Description");
// ...
```

## 🌍 Environment

- **Fox.TaskFlow Version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **.NET Version**: [e.g., .NET 10.0]
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **IDE**: [e.g., Visual Studio 2026, Rider 2024.3]

## 📎 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (stack traces, logs, screenshots, etc.).

## ✔️ Possible Solution

If you have a suggestion on how to fix the bug, please describe it here.
